parameters.query:
SELECT 
  id::text,
  invoice_number,
  supplier_id::text,
  invoice_date::text,
  subtotal_net::float as subtotal_net,
  total_gross::float as total_gross,
  status::text,
  paid_amount::float,
  due_date::text,
  lexware_voucher_id,
  lexware_synced_at::text,
  lexware_forwarded_at::text,
  pdf_storage_path,
  invoice_type,
  email_from
FROM purchase_invoices
WHERE invoice_date >= '2026-01-01'
ORDER BY invoice_date DESC;

nodes.name: 🔄 Reconcile
nodes.notes: Vergleicht Lexware ↔ DB: synced, missing, lexware_only

nodes.name: 📝 Build Sync Query
nodes.notes: Baut UPDATE-Statements für alle geänderten Belege

nodes.name: 📝 Execute Sync
nodes.notes: Führt die Status-Updates in der DB aus

nodes.name: 📧 Resend Missing to Lexware
nodes.notes: Identifiziert max 5 Belege die noch nie an Lexware weitergeleitet wurden

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO events (event_type, payload, source_system, source_flow, idempotency_key)
VALUES (
  'RECONCILIATION_COMPLETED',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'total_lexware', {{ $('🔄 Reconcile').first().json.total_lexware }},
    'total_db', {{ $('🔄 Reconcile').first().json.total_db }},
    'synced_count', {{ $('🔄 Reconcile').first().json.synced.length }},
    'missing_count', {{ $('🔄 Reconcile').first().json.missing_lexware.length }},
    'lexware_only_count', {{ $('🔄 Reconcile').first().json.lexware_only.length }},
    'errors_count', {{ $('🔄 Reconcile').first().json.errors.length }},
    'run_date', '{{ $now.format("yyyy-MM-dd") }}'
  ),
  'n8n',
  'M6_10_Lexware_Reconciliation',
  'reconciliation_{{ $now.format("yyyy-MM-dd") }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (idempotency_key) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id::text;

nodes.name: 📢 Log Reconciliation Event
nodes.notes: Schreibt RECONCILIATION_COMPLETED Event mit Idempotenz-Key pro Tag

INSERT INTO events (event_type, payload, source_system, source_flow, idempotency_key)
VALUES (
  'RECONCILIATION_COMPLETED',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'total_lexware', {{ $('🔄 Reconcile').first().json.total_lexware }},
    'total_db', {{ $('🔄 Reconcile').first().json.total_db }},
    'synced_count', {{ $('🔄 Reconcile').first().json.synced.length }},
    'missing_count', {{ $('🔄 Reconcile').first().json.missing_lexware.length }},
    'lexware_only_count', {{ $('🔄 Reconcile').first().json.lexware_only.length }},
    'errors_count', {{ $('🔄 Reconcile').first().json.errors.length }},
    'run_date', '{{ $now.format("yyyy-MM-dd") }}'

  'n8n',
  'M6_10_Lexware_Reconciliation',
  'reconciliation_{{ $now.format("yyyy-MM-dd") }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (idempotency_key) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id::text;
